basic_details.job_title: GSSSB Additional Assistant Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 14 Posts
basic_details.job_category: Special Recruitment Drive for PwD (Divyang) Candidates
basic_details.short_information: Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board (GSSSB), Gandhinagar has published Advertisement No. 402/2025-26 for the recruitment of Additional Assistant Engineer (Civil), Class-3 under a Special Recruitment Drive (Special Bharti Jumbesh) exclusively for Persons with Disabilities (Divyang / PwD) candidates. A total of 14 vacancies are to be filled in the Narmada, Water Resources, Water Supply and Kalpsar Department under the Gujarat Water Supply and Sewerage Board. Eligible Divyang candidates can apply online through the OJAS portal to 10 May 2026 (23:59 hrs).

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 33 years Age relaxation is applicable as per rules: PwD General Male: +10 years (max 43); General Female: +15 years (max 45); Reserved Male: +15 years (max 45); Reserved Female: +20 years (max 45). Age limit as on 20-03-2026.

qualification.details: Diploma in Civil Engineering or equivalent variants (BE/B.Tech not eligible). Basic computer knowledge as per Gujarat Civil Services Rules 1967. Adequate knowledge of Gujarati and Hindi.

salary_details.details: Rs. 49,600/- (Fixed Pay for first 5 years) Rs. 39,900/- to Rs. 1,26,600/- (Level-7) after 5 years

selection_process: Written Exam (MCQ: Part-A 90 marks General subjects
40% qualifying in each part) Document Verification
how_to_apply: 1. Visit the official OJAS website https://ojas.gujarat.gov.in
2. Complete One Time Registration (OTR) if not already registered.
3. Fill all the required personal, educational and category details carefully in the online application.
4. Upload scanned copy of photograph and signature in prescribed format.
6. Verify all details and confirm/submit the application form.
7. Take printout of the confirmed application for future reference.
important_instructions: This recruitment is only for Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (Divyang). Candidates must possess valid disability certificate (40% or more). Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidature. Upload all required documents before the last date. Scribe and Compensatory time facility available for eligible PwD candidates. Regularly visit GSSSB and OJAS websites for updates.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GSSSB Additional Assistant Engineer (Civil) posts?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the GSSSB Additional Assistant Engineer (Civil), Class-3 posts is 20 March 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Diploma in Civil Engineering or an equivalent qualification. Basic computer knowledge and adequate knowledge of Gujarati and Hindi are also mandatory requirements.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Additional Assistant Engineer (Civil) post?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 33 years as of 20 March 2026. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories and certain other groups.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Additional Assistant Engineer (Civil) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 14 vacancies for the Additional Assistant Engineer (Civil), Class-3 post announced by the Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the GSSSB recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 400/- for all candidates and Rs. 200/- for Reserved Category (Physically Handicapped Candidates).

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Exam (MCQ) followed by Document Verification. Candidates must qualify in both parts of the written exam.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary structure for the Additional Assistant Engineer (Civil) post?
faq.answer: Initially, candidates will receive a fixed pay of Rs. 49,600/- for the first 5 years. After 5 years, the salary will be in the range of Rs. 39,900/- to Rs. 1,26,600/- (Level-7).

faq.question: Q8. Can BE/B.Tech graduates apply for this post?
faq.answer: No, BE/B.Tech graduates are not eligible for this recruitment. Only candidates with a Diploma in Civil Engineering or equivalent are considered.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided in this article. It is recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. How should I apply for the GSSSB Additional Assistant Engineer (Civil) recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official GSSSB website or the direct apply link provided. Ensure all details are accurate and upload necessary documents before the last date.
